text.title: Lessons Learned Examples
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example showing how the lessons-learned methodology converts inputs into a valid `report` artefact. Trace mirrors the decision-tree example in `06-decision-tree.xml`.

example.setting: A representative case satisfying all `Applies If` preconditions.
example.trace: repository_present=true → retrieval_enforced=true → categories_defined=true → new lesson tagged + retrievable.
